question_tagalog: Anong part ng nakaraan mo ang feeling mo kailangan mo pang i-heal?
question_english: What part of your past do you feel you still need to heal from?
quote_tagalog: Hindi minamadali ang paghihilom.
quote_english: Healing is not rushed.

question_tagalog: Paano kita matutulungan kapag naaalala mo yung mga pain mo dati?
question_english: How can I help you when you remember your past pains?
quote_tagalog: Nandito ako, hindi ka na mag-iisa.
quote_english: I'm here, you're no longer alone.

question_tagalog: Ano yung bigat sa puso mo na gusto mo nang bitawan ngayon?
question_english: What heaviness in your heart do you want to let go of now?
quote_tagalog: Ilabas mo lang, sasaluhin kita.
quote_english: Just let it out, I will catch you.

question_tagalog: May trauma ka ba sa past relationships mo na naiintindihan ko na ngayon?
question_english: Do you have trauma from past relationships that I understand now?
quote_tagalog: Ibang iba ang pagmamahal na ito.
quote_english: This love is completely different.

question_tagalog: Paano mo narealize na safe ka nang maging vulnerable sakin?
question_english: How did you realize you are safe to be vulnerable with me?
quote_tagalog: Sa yakap mo natapos ang pagiging matapang ko.
quote_english: In your embrace, my pretending to be brave ended.

question_tagalog: Kailan mo naramdaman na dahan-dahan ka nang nag-heheal?
question_english: When did you feel that you were slowly healing?
quote_tagalog: Araw-araw kitang pipiliin kahit mahirap.
quote_english: I will choose you everyday even if it's hard.

question_tagalog: Ano yung dating triggering sayo pero ngayon kaya mo nang pag-usapan?
question_english: What used to be triggering to you but now you can talk about?
quote_tagalog: Oras ang kasagutan sa lahat ng sakit.
quote_english: Time is the answer to all pain.

question_tagalog: Paano natin maiiwasang ma-project yung past traumas natin sa isa't isa?
question_english: How do we avoid projecting our past traumas onto each other?
quote_tagalog: Mag-uusap kahit mahirap.
quote_english: We will talk even if it's hard.

question_tagalog: Ano yung words of affirmation na laging nagpapagaan ng pakiramdam mo?
question_english: What words of affirmation always make you feel better?
quote_tagalog: Sapat ka at mahal kita kung sino ka.
quote_english: You are enough and I love you for who you are.

question_tagalog: May time ba na naisip mong baka saktan din kita tulad nila?
question_english: Was there a time you thought I'd hurt you like they did?
quote_tagalog: Patutunayan kong mali ang pangamba mo.
quote_english: I will prove your fears wrong.

question_tagalog: Ano yung natutunan mo sa sarili mo habang nag-heheal ka kasama ko?
question_english: What did you learn about yourself while healing with me?
quote_tagalog: Matapang ka pero pwede kang magpahinga sakin.
You are brave but you can rest with me.

question_tagalog: Anong maliit na bagay ang ginawa ko na nakatulong sa healing mo?
question_english: What small thing did I do that helped your healing?
quote_tagalog: Pakinggan ka nang walang pag-question.
quote_english: To listen to you without questioning.

question_tagalog: Saan ka pinaka nahihirapan mag-forgive, sa sarili mo o sa iba?
question_english: Where is it hardest to forgive, yourself or others?
quote_tagalog: Patawarin mo muna ang sarili mo, mahal.
quote_english: Forgive yourself first, love.

question_tagalog: Anong nakasanayan mong coping mechanism na gusto mong baguhin natin?
question_english: What coping mechanism are you used to that you want us to change?
quote_tagalog: Wag ka nang magkimkim, andito na ako.
quote_english: Don't bottle it up anymore, I am here.

question_tagalog: Ano yung promise natin sa isa't isa para masiguro yung mental at emotional peace natin?
question_english: What's our promise to ensure our mental and emotional peace?
quote_tagalog: Walang matutulog nang may galit.
quote_english: No one will sleep angry.

question_tagalog: Sa anong way ko nai-invalidate ang feelings mo nang hindi ko alam?
question_english: In what way do I invalidate your feelings without knowing?
quote_tagalog: Sabihin mo, aayusin ko.
quote_english: Tell me, I will fix it.

question_tagalog: Anong sitwasyon yung pakiramdam mo ay mag-isa ka pero nandun ako?
question_english: What situation did you feel alone but I was there?
quote_tagalog: Bulag ang kalungkutan, pero nandito ang kamay ko.
quote_english: Sadness is blind, but my hand is here.

question_tagalog: Ano ang definition mo ng 'safe space' bago ako dumating, at ngayon?
question_english: What was your definition of 'safe space' before me, and now?
quote_tagalog: Ako ang magiging kanlungan mo sa bagyo.
quote_english: I will be your refuge in the storm.

question_tagalog: Kailan mo gustong yakapin lang kita nang mahigpit at walang sinasabi?
question_english: When do you just want me to hug you tightly without saying anything?
quote_tagalog: Sa yakap ko madidinig ang lahat ng gusto mong malaman.
quote_english: In my embrace you will hear everything you want to know.

question_tagalog: Ano yung insecurity mo na nararamdaman mo parin hanggang ngayon?
question_english: What insecurity do you still feel until today?
quote_tagalog: Perpekto ka sa paningin ko, tandaan mo iyan.
quote_english: You are perfect in my eyes, remember that.

question_tagalog: Sino o ano yung madalas mong kinukumpara sa relationship natin dahil sa trauma?
question_english: Who or what do you often compare our relationship to because of trauma?
quote_tagalog: Tayo'y gumagawa ng sariling kwento.
quote_english: We are making our own story.

question_tagalog: Ano yung fears mo pagdating sa abandonment na pwede kong pakalmahin?
question_english: What are your fears of abandonment that I can calm?
quote_tagalog: Hindi ako aalis kapag mahirap na.
quote_english: I will not leave when it gets hard.

question_tagalog: May times ba na you push me away to protect yourself?
question_english: Are there times you push me away to protect yourself?
quote_tagalog: Kahit tabuyin mo ko, hindi kita iiwanan naiyak.
quote_english: Even if you push me away, I won't leave you crying.

question_tagalog: Pano ko ma-ssupport best ang healing process mo sa mga susunod na araw?
question_english: How can I best support your healing process in the coming days?
quote_tagalog: Asahan mo ang walang sawang pang-unawa.
quote_english: Expect endless understanding.

question_tagalog: Anong parte ng pagmamahal ko sa'yo ang hindi mo inasahang ganun kakailangan mo?
question_english: What part of my love for you did you not expect you'd need so much?
quote_tagalog: Ang pasensya at araw araw na pagpili.
quote_english: Patience and choosing you every day.

question_tagalog: Nabigyan ba kita ng space para masaktan at hindi maging 'okay' lang lagi?
question_english: Did I give you space to hurt and not just be 'okay' always?
quote_tagalog: Ayos lang hindi maging ayos, andito lang ako.
quote_english: It's okay not to be okay, I'm just here.

question_tagalog: Ano ang natuklasan mo sa strength mo nung dumaan tayo sa mabigat na problema?
question_english: What did you discover about your strength when we went through a big problem?
quote_tagalog: Matatag tayo higit pa sa inaakala natin.
quote_english: We are stronger than we thought.

question_tagalog: Kanino ka unang nag-oopen up pag nagkakaroon ka ng emotional breakdown?
question_english: Who do you first open up to when you have an emotional breakdown?
quote_tagalog: Sana ako ang unang sumasagi sa isip mo.
quote_english: I hope I am the first one on your mind.

question_tagalog: Sa papaanong paraan mo ako gustong magtanong kapag nakikita kitang tahimik?
question_english: In what way do you want me to ask when I see you quiet?
quote_tagalog: Malumanay at puno ng lambing.
quote_english: Soft and full of affection.

question_tagalog: Naiisip mo ba kung gano kalaki in-improve natin communicating our boundaries?
question_english: Do you realize how much we improved communicating our boundaries?
quote_tagalog: Respeto ang pundasyon ng tunay na pagmamahal.
quote_english: Respect is the foundation of true love.

question_tagalog: Anong words ko ang paulit-ulit mong binabalikan pangpalakas ng loob?
question_english: What words of mine do you repeatedly go back to for encouragement?
quote_tagalog: Andito ako, hindi ka mag iisa.
quote_english: I am here, you won't be alone.

question_tagalog: Nahihirapan ka pa ba magtiwala ulit matapos kang lokohin o iwan dati?
question_english: Is it still hard for you to trust again after being cheated on or left before?
quote_tagalog: Iibahin natin ang ending mo ngayon.
quote_english: We will change your ending now.

question_tagalog: Kung pwede mong yakapin ang sarili mo noon, anong sasabihin mong promise natin ngayon?
question_english: If you could hug your past self, what promise of ours would you tell?
quote_tagalog: Matatapos din ang lahat ng kirot, darating din siya.
quote_english: All the pain will end, he will come.

question_tagalog: Nakaramdam ka na ba na pinabilis ko proseso ng pag e-explain mo ng emotions mo?
question_english: Have you felt I rushed the process of you explaining your emotions?
quote_tagalog: Maghihintay ako hanggang handa ka nang magsalita.
quote_english: I will wait until you're ready to speak.

question_tagalog: Bakit importanteng sa ating dalawa maging transparent pag dating sa personal healing?
question_english: Why is it important for us to be transparent when it comes to personal healing?
quote_tagalog: Isa tayong team sa buhay na ito.
quote_english: We are a team in this life.

question_tagalog: Na fifeel mo ba yung acceptance ko kahit sa darkest parts mo?
question_english: Do you feel my acceptance even in your darkest parts?
quote_tagalog: Liliwanagan natin kahit ang pinakamadilim.
quote_english: We will light up even the darkest.

question_tagalog: Gaano ako kadalas mag apologize successfully nang nararamdaman mo ang sincerity?
question_english: How often do I successfully apologize where you feel the sincerity?
quote_tagalog: Ang tunay na sorry nararamdaman at nakikita sa gawa.
quote_english: A true sorry is felt and seen in actions.

question_tagalog: Tuwing tinotopak o nago-overthink ka, ano ba talaga ang pinaka hinihingi ng heart mo?
question_english: Whenever you throw tantrums or overthink, what is your heart really asking for?
quote_tagalog: Reassurance lang, at uulitin ko ulit.
quote_english: Just reassurance, and I will repeat it again.

question_tagalog: Meron ka bang habit ngayon na reflection ng takot mo maitapon at makalimutan?
question_english: Do you have a habit now that reflects your fear of being thrown away and forgotten?
quote_tagalog: Mamahalin kita hanggang wala na akong hininga.
quote_english: I will love you until I have no breath.

question_tagalog: May nasabi ba ako noon during fights na naging mitsa ng panibagong sugat sayo?
question_english: Have I said anything before during fights that sparked a new wound in you?
quote_tagalog: Wag na nating uulitin ang maling nagawa.
quote_english: Let's not repeat the wrongs we've done.

question_tagalog: Naiisip mo ba kung gano mo ako natulungan in my own healing journey din?
question_english: Do you think about how you helped me in my own healing journey too?
quote_tagalog: Nagpagalingan tayong dalawa ng di sinasadya.
quote_english: We accidentally healed each other.

question_tagalog: Bakit kaya mas lalong naging strong yung bond natin after nating makayanan ang lowest point natin?
question_english: Why do you think our bond got stronger after surviving our lowest point?
quote_tagalog: Dahil nakita natin ang pinakamasama, ngunit pinili ang isa't isa.
quote_english: Because we saw the worst, but chose each other.

question_tagalog: Paano tayo mag cecelebrate kapag natapos na totally ang isang healing phase ng isa sa atin?
question_english: How do we celebrate when a healing phase of one of us totally ends?
quote_tagalog: Sa bagong yugto ay purong kapayapaan.
quote_english: In the new chapter is pure peace.

question_tagalog: Tuwing nakikita mong ok na ok ka na, anong first thought mo tungkol sakin?
question_english: When you see you're totally okay now, what's your first thought about me?
quote_tagalog: Maraming salamat sa matiyagang pag-ibig mo.
quote_english: Thank you so much for your patient love.

question_tagalog: May words ba akong nagagamit na di sinasadyang nagpapa - trigger ng abandonment issues mo?
question_english: Are there words I use that accidentally trigger your abandonment issues?
quote_tagalog: Aayusin ang salita, para sa laging ikatatahimik mo.
quote_english: Will fix the words, always for your peace.

question_tagalog: Saang aspect mo feel na pinaka nakatulong yung presensya ko sayo nung lugmok ka?
question_english: In which aspect do you feel my presence helped you most when you were down?
quote_tagalog: Presensya lang ay lunas na sa kalungkutan.
quote_english: Presence alone is already a cure for sadness.

question_tagalog: Pwede mo ba i-describe yung feeling ng unti-unting lumalaya sa bigat ng nakaraan dahil satin?
question_english: Can you describe the feeling of slowly being free from the heaviness of the past because of us?
quote_tagalog: Nakakahinga na ako ng maluwag katabi mo.
quote_english: I can breathe easily beside you.

question_tagalog: Nakatulong ba yung way ko of asking things sayo para slowly maging okay ka?
question_english: Did my way of asking things help you slowly become okay?
quote_tagalog: Hindi ka minamadali, maghihintay ako lagi.
quote_english: You're not rushed, I will always wait.

question_tagalog: Kung bibigyan kita ng comfort sa paraang alam mong the best, pano ko siya gagawin?
question_english: If I give you comfort in the best way you know, how will I do it?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw lang nakakalam paano ako masuyong kalmahin.
quote_english: Only you know how to sweetly calm me.

question_tagalog: Sa anong klaseng pamamaraan tayo pwede maging better in checking each other's mental state?
question_english: In what way can we be better in checking each other's mental state?
quote_tagalog: Laging uunahin ang kalusugan ng isip nating dalawa.
quote_english: Will always prioritize the mental health of us both.

question_tagalog: Naiiyak ka parin ba minsan kapag naaalala mo panong ginamot ko yung trauma mo?
question_english: Do you still cry sometimes when you remember how I treated your trauma?
quote_tagalog: Wala nang sakit, ikaw ang aking lunas.
quote_english: No more pain, you are my cure.

question_tagalog: Anong trait ko ang the complete opposite ng nanakit sayo dati?
question_english: What trait of mine is the complete opposite of who hurt you before?
quote_tagalog: Ibang iba ang mundo ko sayo.
quote_english: My world with you is completely different.

question_tagalog: Saan mas mahirap para satin, ang mag-forgive ba o ang kalimutan nalang?
question_english: Where is it harder for us, to forgive or to just forget?
quote_tagalog: Pagpapatawad ay magpapalaya satin.
quote_english: Forgiveness will free us.

question_tagalog: Anong pakiramdam tuwing napapag-usapan na natin as clear and calm as daylight ang dating iniiyakan mo?
question_english: How does it feel when we can calmly talk about what you used to cry over?
quote_tagalog: Kinaya natin lahat, ikaw at ako.
quote_english: We overcame it all, you and I.

question_tagalog: Napapaisip ka ba na paano kaya kung sa past natin nakilala ang isa't isa?
question_english: Do you wonder what if we met each other in the past?
quote_tagalog: Dumating ka sa pinakatamang oras.
quote_english: You arrived at the perfect time.

question_tagalog: Pano mo inaakbayan sarili mong thoughts ngayon na hindi mo magawa nuon?
question_english: How do you handle your own thoughts now that you couldn't do before?
quote_tagalog: Mas malakas ka na, natuto ka na rin.
quote_english: You are stronger now, you also learned.

question_tagalog: Tuwing pinagdududahan mo love ko dahil sa luma mong trauma, pano kita na rere-ground sa reality?
question_english: Whenever you doubt my love due to old trauma, how do I ground you to reality?
quote_tagalog: Ang katotohanan ay pilit kitang mamahalin nang wagas.
quote_english: The truth is I will tirelessly love you endlessly.

question_tagalog: Sa paanong paraan tayo nagbago compared kung pano tayo noon bago mag simula ang tunay na healing?
question_english: In what way did we change compared to how we were before real healing started?
quote_tagalog: Lahat ng binabago para sa ikabubuti natin.
quote_english: All changes are for our own good.

question_tagalog: Tingin mo as of now asahan parin that there is always something unhealed in a person despite moving on?
question_english: Do you think as of now it's expected that there's always something unhealed despite moving on?
quote_tagalog: Kahit ano pa man yan, andito ako para payapain yan.
quote_english: Whatever that is, I'm here to calm it.

question_tagalog: Anong word ang pwede mong idikit sa healing journey natin together bilang couples?
question_english: What word can you attach to our healing journey together as couples?
quote_tagalog: Wakas ng sakit at panimula ng bukas.
quote_english: End of pain and start of tomorrow.
